emails.subject: RE: Morris Letter
emails.body: I have a copy of the lease to give to you. How long are you going to be in your office? Lorie Albrecht Senior Admin. Asst. Enron East Power Generation Development Office: 713-853-1696 To: Zisman, Stuart; Leigh, Lorie; Tapscott, Ron; Jacoby, Ben; Schneider, Chip

emails.subject: RE: Morris Letter
emails.body: Probably until 6. To: Mann, Kay; Zisman, Stuart; Tapscott, Ron; Jacoby, Ben; Schneider, Chip

emails.subject: RE: Morris Letter
emails.body: Is this letter approved to go out today? Please advise. Lorie Albrecht Senior Admin. Asst. Enron East Power Generation Development Office: 713-853-1696 To: Leigh, Lorie

emails.subject: RE: Morris Letter
emails.body: Stuart had a suggested change. I'll email it to you. To: Mann, Kay; Zisman, Stuart; Tapscott, Ron; Jacoby, Ben; Schneider, Chip
